strengthening_paths.suggestion: Turn Conjecture 2 into an explicit numeric table of P(W,Z,A), m_P(z,a), the one-dimensional fiber endpoints, and theta_Qlambda endpoints; this would make the nondegeneracy claim auditable before proving the open-class theorem.
State a sharper genericity condition for Conjecture 1 in terms of normal cones/SPD-exposed bridge points, so the open-class claim is not read as an existence-only convex-geometry restatement.
Add a short corollary distinguishing invariant bridge nonuniqueness from penalty-selected nonidentification for the proximal OR estimand in CuiPuShiMiaoTchetgen2024JASA notation.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and require an explicit binary witness attempt early in the derivation.
